identify_breaking_api.expected_solution: Agent must identify the breaking change in producer `grpc/grpc-go` introduced by grpc/grpc-go#1157. The IMPACT_REPORT.md must name the legacy symbols (metadata.FromContext and metadata.NewContext) and their replacements (metadata.FromIncomingContext, metadata.FromOutgoingContext, and metadata.NewOutgoingContext), and point to producer-side artifacts (metadata/metadata.go, transport/handler_server.go, transport/http2_client.go, transport/http2_server.go, grpclb/grpclb_test.go, interop/test_utils.go, and Documentation/grpc-metadata.md).
evaluation_criteria: Names the producer repository `grpc/grpc-go` and the breaking PR/commit (grpc/grpc-go#1157)
Lists the deprecated/removed symbols: metadata.FromContext and metadata.NewContext
Lists the replacement symbols: metadata.FromIncomingContext, metadata.FromOutgoingContext, and metadata.NewOutgoingContext
References at least one producer-side file (basename: metadata.go, handler_server.go, http2_client.go, http2_server.go, grpclb_test.go, test_utils.go, and grpc-metadata.md)

find_direct_consumers.expected_solution: Agent must enumerate every consumer file in etcd-io/etcd that uses the deprecated symbols (metadata.FromContext and metadata.NewContext). Per ground_truth: etcd: auth/store.go, etcdserver/api/v3rpc/interceptor.go, etcdserver/api/v3rpc/grpc.go, clientv3/auth.go. The report must cite each consumer file by name and indicate which deprecated symbol it depends on.
evaluation_criteria: Cites each consumer file by name (basenames: store.go, interceptor.go, grpc.go, and auth.go)
For each cited consumer, names which deprecated symbol from metadata.FromContext and metadata.NewContext it uses
Distinguishes files with compile-time dependencies from files that only forward/proxy the symbol

trace_transitive_impact.expected_solution: Agent must trace transitive impact: which downstream code paths in etcd-io/etcd indirectly observe the producer change. The answer must identify forwarding/middleware/interceptor code that propagates the affected types and explain why the type or contract change cascades beyond the directly-importing files. Reference the consumer fix PR(s) (etcd-io/etcd#8160) where applicable.
evaluation_criteria: Identifies at least one transitive code path beyond the direct importers (interceptor/middleware/wrapper)
Explains the propagation mechanism (type changes, signature changes, behavior drift) for metadata.FromContext and metadata.NewContext
Cross-references the consumer-side fix PR(s) (etcd-io/etcd#8160) or the migration pattern they encode

classify_breakage.expected_solution: Agent must classify each affected file by failure mode. The ground-truth breakage type is `compile_and_runtime`. For `compile_and_runtime` cases the report must identify both compile-time breakage (undefined functions, signature mismatches) and runtime behavior changes (silent metadata loss, semantic shifts). For `compile_only` or `runtime_only` cases, justify why only one class applies.
evaluation_criteria: Distinguishes compile-time failures (undefined functions, type errors) from runtime behavior changes (silent semantics drift)
Identifies at least one specific consumer file per failure class consistent with the classification
